channel.title: enola.bedard TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from enola.bedard

item.title: This momet felt like a movie…🥹 Happy Valentines Day @Jordan Taylor Wright

item.title: GRWM for a special @Ghostface event!!!! Thank you so much @ladyblacktie for sending me the MOST beautiful red dress!! I was OBSESSED!! #scream7movie

item.title: It’s the police car in the back for me 🚔 😂 doing this dance in heels was next level omg hahaha tag DC #dance#public @Doja Cat

item.title: When 2 boys recognized me in public 😂 Did they pass the vibe check???? Even the dog was confused ahahah who wanna see the results???? #badbunny #behindthescenes

item.title: Trust the process wait for it 😂🔥 comment UNAVEZ 10 times if I should drop this one!!!!! Help me blow this song up so I can tell my team to drop this song ahahha!!!!! #unavez #newmusic

item.title: 🚨Bad Bunny Halftime Show🚨 02/27 9am PT time on my YouTube Channel 🫶🏻 comment BAD BUNNY if you’re ready 🔥🔥🙌🏻 #badbunny #superbowl #teaser

item.title: The news is out!!! We did a fullout concept video for Bad Bunny Superbowl halftime show!!!! Who’s ready to see the video??? On my YouTube Channel this friday 9am PT time. CANT WAIIIITT

item.title: When I wrote a song in French, English and Spanish 🤩 This song comes out 03/27 and I’m so excited for you all to hear the full version ❤️❤️🫶🏻 comment UNAVEZ if youre ready!!!! #unavez

item.title: @JLO just dropped a new song and I had to make a dsnce to it during out shoot!!! 🤩 comment JLO if you are also obsessed with this song!!!

item.title: Im telling you guys so many stuff happens when I shoot this dance….😏🤣 @augustogimenez @Nicolle Figueroa dc: @tracy.oj

item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10
item.description: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: My audition to be the opening act for @ladygaga one day 🤩🔥 tag her in the comments🫶🏻 Woow the crowd reaction in Barcelona left my mom and I speechless!!! For sure the biggest crowd and reaction I’ve ever gotten from the public!!!! Will remember this forev
item.description: My audition to be the opening act for @ladygaga one day 🤩🔥 tag her in the comments🫶🏻 Woow the crowd reaction in Barcelona left my mom and I speechless!!! For sure the biggest crowd and reaction I’ve ever gotten from the public!!!! Will remember this forev
item.author: enola.bedard
